message:
refactor(cli): Remove multiple flow patterns, use single built-from-source tools

Removed  and  targets - only keep  target.

Changed edgeboxc to use built-from-source tools instead of system CLIs:
- wasm-opt → edgebox-wasm-opt (Binaryen C library)
- wizer → edgebox-wizer (pure Zig WAMR-based)

Removed all fallback patterns ('which' checks) that would silently skip
optimization if system tools weren't found.

Now all tools are built from source as part of 'zig build cli':
- edgebox
- edgeboxc
- edgeboxd
- edgebox-sandbox
- edgebox-wizer (replaces cargo wizer)
- edgebox-wasm-opt (replaces system wasm-opt)
- WAMR AOT compiler (uses system LLVM-18)

Only exception: LLVM-18 (really needed for AOT compilation)
